title: BBAI - BigBear.ai Holdings, Inc. Stock - Stock Price, Institutional Ownership, Shareholders
text: BigBear.ai Holdings, Inc. (BBAI) institutional ownership and shareholder information. BBAI is held by major institutional investors including mutual funds and investment firms. Recent activity shows Vanguard lifting its BigBear.ai stake by 18%, demonstrating continued institutional interest in the company's growth potential and defense AI positioning despite current profitability challenges.
